name: Card
description: Flexible container with header, content, and footer slots.

api.name: Card
api.description: Flexible container with header, content, and footer slots.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Optional click handler. When set, the card becomes a button-role interactive surface with cursor-pointer, focus-visible ring, keyboard activation, and honours PressEffect.

parameters.name: PressEffect
parameters.description: Visual feedback when the card is pressed (only applies when OnClick is bound). Default is None.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Surface style — four tiers, matching the depth ramp of shadcn (bordered → shadow), Radix Themes (ghost|surface|classic) and MudBlazor (Outlined / Elevation): Default — bordered card with the card background (no shadow). Flat — drops the border + card background; a content-only surface that (with OnClick) is the natural primitive for clickable list rows, replacing the Ghost button + !p-0 workaround. Outline — bordered but with a transparent fill, so the page background shows through; for cards layered on a coloured/!card surface. Elevated — bordered card background plus a shadow-sm for a raised, floating feel (shadcn's default Card depth).

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-card density override. Tightens internal padding when rendered inside dense layouts (DataGrid row, dashboard tile grid). Falls back to ancestor DensityScope or Comfortable.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Optional click handler. When set, the card becomes a button-role interactive surface with cursor-pointer, focus-visible ring, keyboard activation, and honours PressEffect.

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Card>
    <CardHeader>
        <Heading Level="3" Size="lg" Class="leading-none tracking-tight">Notifications</Heading>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">You have 3 unread messages.</Lumeo.Text>
    </CardHeader>
    <CardContent>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm">Your recent notifications will appear here.</Lumeo.Text>
    </CardContent>
    <CardFooter>
        <Button Class="w-full">Mark all as read</Button>
    </CardFooter>
</Card>

examples.title: Card with Actions
examples.code:
<Card>
    <CardHeader>
        <Heading Level="3" Size="lg" Class="leading-none tracking-tight">Blog Post</Heading>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Published on Jan 12, 2025</Lumeo.Text>
    </CardHeader>
    <CardContent>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="foreground">
            Learn how to build accessible, composable UI components using
            Blazor and Tailwind CSS in this in-depth guide.
        </Lumeo.Text>
    </CardContent>
    <CardFooter>
        <Flex Gap="2" Class="w-full">
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
                <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Copy" class="h-4 w-4" /> Edit
            </Button>
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
                <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Trash" class="h-4 w-4" /> Delete
            </Button>
        </Flex>
    </CardFooter>
</Card>

examples.title: Horizontal Card
examples.code:
<Card>
    <Flex>
        <Center Class="w-32 h-32 rounded-l-lg bg-muted shrink-0">
            <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Star" class="h-10 w-10 text-muted-foreground" />
        </Center>
        <Stack Gap="0" Class="flex-1">
            <CardHeader>
                <Heading Level="3" Size="base" Weight="semibold" Class="leading-none tracking-tight">Featured Article</Heading>
                <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">5 min read</Lumeo.Text>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
                <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">
                    An introduction to modern component-driven design systems.
                </Lumeo.Text>
            </CardContent>
            <CardFooter>
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Link" Class="px-0">Read more</Button>
            </CardFooter>
        </Stack>
    </Flex>
</Card>

examples.title: With Form
examples.code:
<Card>
    <CardHeader>
        <Heading Level="3" Size="lg" Class="leading-none tracking-tight">Create project</Heading>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Deploy your new project in one click.</Lumeo.Text>
    </CardHeader>
    <CardContent>
        <Stack Gap="4">
            <FormField Label="Name">
                <Input placeholder="Name of your project" />
            </FormField>
            <FormField Label="Description">
                <Input placeholder="Describe your project" />
            </FormField>
        </Stack>
    </CardContent>
    <CardFooter>
        <Flex Justify="between" Class="w-full">
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">Cancel</Button>
            <Button>Deploy</Button>
        </Flex>
    </CardFooter>
</Card>

mdSummary:
# Card

Flexible container with header, content, and footer slots.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Cards & Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/card

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Card | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Card | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Card | OnClick | `EventCallback<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs>` | `` | Optional click handler. When set, the card becomes a button-role interactive surface with cursor-pointer, focus-visible ring, keyboard activation, and honours PressEffect. |
| Card | PressEffect | `Button.ButtonPressEffect` | `Button.ButtonPressEffect.None` | Visual feedback when the card is pressed (only applies when OnClick is bound). Default is None. |
| Card | Variant | `CardVariant` | `CardVariant.Default` | Surface style — four tiers, matching the depth ramp of shadcn (bordered → shadow), Radix Themes (ghost\|surface\|classic) and MudBlazor (Outlined / Elevation): Default — bordered card with the card background (no shadow). Flat — drops the border + card background; a content-only surface that (with OnClick) is the natural primitive for clickable list rows, replacing the Ghost button + !p-0 workaround. Outline — bordered but with a transparent fill, so the page background shows through; for cards layered on a coloured/!card surface. Elevated — bordered card background plus a shadow-sm for a raised, floating feel (shadcn's default Card depth). |
| Card | Density | `Density?` | `` | Per-card density override. Tightens internal padding when rendered inside dense layouts (DataGrid row, dashboard tile grid). Falls back to ancestor DensityScope or Comfortable. |
| Card | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| Card | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CardContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CardContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CardContent | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| CardContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CardDescription | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CardDescription | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CardDescription | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CardFooter | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CardFooter | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CardFooter | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| CardFooter | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CardHeader | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CardHeader | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CardHeader | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| CardHeader | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| CardTitle | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| CardTitle | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| CardTitle | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Card) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CardContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CardDescription) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CardFooter) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CardHeader) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (CardTitle) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnClick` (`EventCallback<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs>`) — Optional click handler. When set, the card becomes a button-role interactive surface with cursor-pointer, focus-visible ring, keyboard activation, and honours PressEffect.

## Sub-components
- `CardContent`, `CardDescription`, `CardFooter`, `CardHeader`, `CardTitle`

## Cascading values it expects
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)
- `Density` (`Lumeo.Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — HandleKeyDown handles Enter in Card.razor
- ` ` — HandleKeyDown handles   in Card.razor

## Example
```razor
<Card />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-card-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Card/Card.razor`
- `UI/Card/CardContent.razor`
- `UI/Card/CardDescription.razor`
- `UI/Card/CardFooter.razor`
- `UI/Card/CardHeader.razor`
- `UI/Card/CardTitle.razor`
